data.title: worktree-tracking-comment contract doc says :complete is posted before merge but harvest-worktree.sh posts it after merge in cleanup trap
data.description: The worktree-tracking-comment.md contract specifies :complete is 'Posted after all implementation work is done and committed in the worktree, before merge back to the session branch.' However, harvest-worktree.sh posts WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete in _harvest_cleanup() which fires after the merge. For the success path, the timing differs from the stated contract. Either update the contract to say 'after merge' or move the success-path comment write to before the merge step. (Minor semantic mismatch found during code review of 16f8-4b57.)
